article_meta.title: Of Course, There's a Biden Connection to DC's Fecal Fiasco Here's Something the Media Is Trying to Keep Quiet About Goldman Sachs' Top..

reasoning: The assistant flagged multiple items that are not the columnist’s own connecting prose (site/trending headlines) and misattributed a paraphrased view clearly belonging to Charlie Kirk as the author’s opinion. It also missed clear author-level loaded wording (e.g., "stridently," "rings hollow"). Some correctly identified author prose was labeled appropriately.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: One clear violation: the model flagged a paraphrased, attributed stance (Kirk’s view) as if it were the author’s own claim.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several flagged items are site/trending headlines from other articles, not the columnist’s prose, and thus not valid author-level bias. Also the Kirk line is attributed.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed at least 1–2 clear instances in the author’s own prose, such as the loaded verb "stridently" and evaluative phrase "rings hollow."
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the genuinely author-level items identified (editor’s note promo and author’s concluding framing), the labels are reasonable; issues lie mainly in selection, not labeling.
